title: Bank reconciliation statements
summary: 9706 — updating cash book, timing differences, and bank reconciliation.
learningObjectives: Update cash book from bank statement.
Identify unpresented cheques and uncredited deposits.
Explain bank errors and direct debits/standing orders.

simpleExplanation.title: Why bank and books disagree
simpleExplanation.summary: Timing differences cause the bank statement and cash book to differ — reconciliation adjusts for unpresented cheques and amounts not yet credited.
steps: Update cash book — items on statement only.
Unpresented cheques — in cash book, not bank.
Uncredited deposits — paid in, not yet cleared.

sections.content: **Bank reconciliation** (1.4.3) — **update cash book first**, then reconcile.
